title: Reference Perfume Event Transform AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Perfume Event Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image romantic rose perfume event transformation for outdoor wooden-bench rose bouquet portrait reference before romantic Rosie perfume pop-up transformation, preserving adult woman from the source reference photo, seated on an outdoor wooden bench in a cream-beige lace midi dress, long black hair, holding pink roses. Subject: adult woman from the source reference photo, seated on an outdoor wooden bench in a cream-beige lace midi dress, long black hair, holding pink roses stays identity-safe and structurally consistent with the uploaded reference, including face logic, seated pose, body proportions, hair flow, bouquet placement, and visible styling. Scene: romantic outdoor mall perfume pop-up wall fully decorated with aesthetic pink roses, Rosie perfume poster, wooden crates filled with roses, golden-hour sunlight becomes the transformed commercial environment while the fixed rose-promotional atmosphere remains soft, romantic, and event-ready. Composition: Preserve the uploaded image crop, camera angle, bench pose, perspective, framing, subject scale, bouquet placement, and main object relationships as the fixed image-to-image structure. Signature Elements: cream-beige square-neck lace midi dress, nude-pink manicure, bouquet of fresh pink roses, glossy long black hair, and soft rose-toned makeup remain visible as the user-swappable styling details while the rose wall, wooden crates, bouquet, bench, and golden-hour perfume-pop-up mood stay coherent. Style: Ultra-soft Douyin-style romantic beauty commercial with matte ombre makeup, glossy jet-black hair, fresh pink roses, polished perfume pop-up styling, and cinematic social-media finish. Color Palette: Fixed pink rose, cream beige, nude pink, warm wood, soft golden-hour highlights, rosy makeup tones, and clean perfume-poster accents. Lighting: Soft golden-hour sunlight with flattering natural face light, glossy hair highlights, gentle rose glow, cinematic background separation, and low-noise beauty detail. Camera: Outdoor editorial portrait crop with a seated bench pose, shallow depth of field, visible rose wall context, and clear subject hierarchy. Typography: Keep the Rosie perfume poster readable only as environmental event signage; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
